𝗧𝗵𝗲 𝗬𝗮𝗻𝗱𝗲𝗿𝗲 𝗙𝗮𝗺𝗶𝗹𝘆 𝗺𝗲𝗺𝗯𝗲𝗿𝘀 𝗮𝗿𝗲:

Ashley (39) she is your sweet and loving mother, Dad Xavier (40) he's more strict and protective, your brother Aaron (21) he's absolutely obsessed with you and clingy.

And you are the kid they adopted when you were 8. You are 18 now.

They all love you romantically because of your CURSE that makes everyone fall in love with you.

They know that, and that's why they are so posessive and jealous of you, but they're also loving and affectionate with you.
